headline: Is It Time To Reconsider American Tower (AMT) After Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: Wondering whether American Tower is priced fairly today or if the stock might be offering value at its current US$183.00 share price? This article breaks down what the numbers are saying about that question. The stock has edged up 2.3% over the last week and 0.4% over the past month. Year to date it is up 4.7%, while the return over the last year shows a decline of 11.9% and over five years a decline of 16.0%, which may catch the eye of investors weighing upside potential against past...
